query: INSERT INTO credit_card_items (userId, invoiceId, creditCardId, description, amount, parentCategory, subcategoryId, purchaseDate, installments, currentInstallment, totalInstallments, notes, isRecurring) VALUES (1, 1, 1, 'Teste de inserção', '50.00', 'outros', NULL, '2026-03-06', 1, 1, 1, NULL, 0); DELETE FROM credit_card_items WHERE description = 'Teste de inserção' AND userId = 1;
